title: oxalis yungasensis
intro: Oxalis yungasensis, also known as the Yungasense wood sorrel, is a species of flowering plant in the wood sorrel family (Oxalidaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Oxalis yungasensis include its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels, as well as its ability to act as an antimicrobial agent, preventing the growth of bacteria and other microorganisms. Oxalis yungasensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has also been used in traditional medicine as a topical application for skin conditions and wounds.
